case_title: SANG CHEOL WOO VS. CHARLES C. SPACKMAN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100081784): FELLOWES, ALEXANDRA SUBSTITUTED FOR BURTON, LUKE J. AS ATTORNEY FOR WOO, SANG CHEOL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WOO, SANG CHEOL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO, SANG CHEOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPACKMAN, CHARLES C. $13,827,168.24 PRINCIPAL, $130,961.20 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,958,579.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DECLARATION OF NICHOLAS A. ICKOVIC IN SUPPORT OF CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210005649) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, SANG CHEOL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 210000033) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, SANG CHEOL AS TO DEFENDANT SPACKMAN, CHARLES C.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, SANG CHEOL AS TO DEFENDANT SPACKMAN, CHARLES C. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
